name: Vink-PaperS3
author: ifocuspace
description: Vink-PaperS3 full-only image for M5Stack PaperS3. Flash the merged 16MB image from offset 0x0.

versions.change_log: Vink-PaperS3 v0.3.2-rc official PaperS3 hardware profile RC. Full-only 16MB image: bootloader + partition table + app + SPIFFS, flash from 0x0. Requires real-device validation for GT911 touch mapping, EPD refresh, SD, battery and wake behavior.
